title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Adobe India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Adobe India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!
